ab: lokah cimu qabax, rayun cimu mkan bnheci qalang ta kisa.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: uya ga! musa cami tqbaq kmayan ke Tayal ki bnheci ta.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說泰雅語。

ab: obih ta tehoq la?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: iyat ta kinga tehoq la.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: yutas Tasaw, nyan cami mwah mkan isu la.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: wa! baq cimu kmayan ke Tayal ga! talagay kinblaq.
ch: B:你們會說泰雅語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You speak Atayal! That’s great!

ab: lokah cimu qabax, rayun cimu mtiyaw cqa qmayax trakis kisa.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: sesiy, uya.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: uwah mblaq cqrux cqani, aray qa qqaya qmahun mamu.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: sesiy uya, nya cami ming qqaya qmahun myan la.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: tehoq ta la?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: ini na, ato thyaq hayi na.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: usa miliq qsya isu.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: uya, haqa cu miliq qsya kingan hiya.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: usa magan qqaya ppgayas qbhniq isu hiya.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: uya, haqa cu ppgayas qbhniq kingan hiya.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: lokah cimu qabax, rayun cimu ktayux qnayat naha qbsinux kisa.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: talagay kinblaq wa! pkusa ta maha nanu musa a?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: phlux ta basu musa.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: blaq ta cqrux cqani, pbes ta kipu lay.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: uya
en: B: Yes.

ab: cyan maki lasu qa qbhniq hiya, mehong nya lga maqu, ktali kya nanak cimu la.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: sesiy baq cu mngungu maqu kingan hiya.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: ana moqo la, usa ktayux qbhniq isu hiya.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: qutux tmucing kisa lga, mwah ta msqun msli cqani la.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: uya, sesiy mhway su.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: nanu qbsinux wayal su ktalun coni?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: piyux calay maqu ru, piyux qbhniq wayal mu ktalan uyi.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: helax hayi, musa cami lay.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: na’ cu cikay, moyay calay kakay mu la.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: hata msqun lmngyaq llyung ga?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: uya! hata lga!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: piyux calay cquliq nyan lmngyaq cqani.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: cilung qsya nya cqani hiya, si ta lmngyaq cqani la.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
